short_blurb: High-end roofing services for Porter Ranch homes and master-planned communities.
local_note: Porter Ranch is one of the most upscale communities in the San Fernando Valley, with large two-story homes, gated communities, and newer builds from the 2000s onward. Many tiles here are now 15–20 years old and due for underlayment replacement. We specialize in tile re-roofing — stripping and re-setting existing tile over new underlayment — which preserves your existing tile profile and HOA color approval while fully renewing the waterproofing system beneath.

faqs.q: Can you re-roof under my existing tile without replacing the tile in Porter Ranch?
faqs.a: Yes. If your tile is in good structural condition, we can lift, clean, and re-set it over new high-performance underlayment. This is a common and cost-effective option for Porter Ranch homes where the tile style is still HOA-approved.
